title: [HWToSMT] Add forsmt-lib-export flag
body: This consolidates the flag added in #9162 into a for-smtlib-export flag that also, given there is only one hw.module and no instance hierarchy, converts that hw.module into an smt.solver operation rather than a func.func op. This should be the last missing piece from a flow from combinational modules to SMTLIB, which we've had a couple of requests for (https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/7786, https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/9138), as the output of this pass can now be passed directly to the SMTLIB exporter (provided the other conversions to SMT have been applied)
